How to find cheap flights from Beijing

We compare prices from dozens of airlines for flights from Beijing (PEK) via Aviasales. Use flexible dates for best prices — shifting by 1-2 days can save 30-50%. Book 2-3 months ahead for domestic and 3-5 months for international flights.
